subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 7
subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who hast made the Point to be the ornament of the Beauty in the Tablet of Revelation! Thou art He Who attached jet-black strands to the orb of light
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من جعل النقطه طراز الجمال فی لوح الظهور و علق خیوط الظلمه علی کره النور
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for unity, @light and darkness, @fire and light; fire and water
